metadata.name: retail_same_store_sales
metadata.author: Migration Marketplace
metadata.description: Same-store (comparable) sales growth KPI for retail.

inject.name: Same-Store Sales Growth %
inject.dax: VAR CurrentSales = CALCULATE(SUM('Sales'[Amount]), 'Stores'[IsComparable] = TRUE()) VAR PriorSales = CALCULATE(SUM('Sales'[Amount]), 'Stores'[IsComparable] = TRUE(), DATEADD('Calendar'[Date], -1, YEAR)) RETURN DIVIDE(CurrentSales - PriorSales, PriorSales)
